1.Name: Platform DB — sysadmin (bypass RLS, all tenants)
1.Comment: System-admin only. app.bypass_rls=true by default — sees all tenant data. RLS enforced but bypass flag set (non-superuser role). Tenant-scoped pgAdmin access is not implemented: GUC-based RLS (app.current_tenant_id) is user-settable so tenant scope cannot be enforced for arbitrary SQL execution. See ADR-ACT-0184.
